en: In the meantime, when so many thousands of the people had gathered together that they were trampling one another, he began to say to his disciples first, "Beware of the leaven of the Pharisees, which is hypocrisy.
zh: 那時有成千上萬的人聚在一起，甚至彼此踐踏。耶穌就先對門徒說：“你們要提防法利賽人的酵，就是虛偽。

en: Nothing is covered up that will not be revealed, or hidden that will not be known.
zh: 沒有甚麼掩蓋的事不被揭露，也沒有甚麼隱藏的事不被人知道。

en: Therefore whatever you have said in the dark shall be heard in the light, and what you have whispered in private rooms shall be proclaimed on the housetops.
zh: 所以，你們在暗處所說的，必在明處被人聽見；在內室附耳所談的，必在房頂上宣揚出來。

en: "I tell you, my friends, do not fear those who kill the body, and after that have nothing more that they can do.
zh: “我的朋友，我告訴你們，那殺身體以後不能再作甚麼的，不要怕他們。

en: But I will warn you whom to fear: fear him who, after he has killed, has authority to cast into hell. Yes, I tell you, fear him!
zh: 我要指示你們當怕的是誰：當怕那殺身體以後，有權把人投入地獄裡的；我告訴你們，應當怕他。

en: Are not five sparrows sold for two pennies? And not one of them is forgotten before God.
zh: 五隻麻雀，不是賣兩個大錢嗎？但在 神面前，一隻也不被忘記。

en: Why, even the hairs of your head are all numbered. Fear not; you are of more value than many sparrows.
zh: 甚至你們的頭髮都一一數過了。不要怕，你們比許多麻雀貴重得多呢。

en: "And I tell you, everyone who acknowledges me before men, the Son of Man also will acknowledge before the angels of God,
zh: “我告訴你們，凡在人面前承認我的，人子在 神的使者面前也承認他；

en: but the one who denies me before men will be denied before the angels of God.
zh: 在人面前不認我的，我在 神的使者面前也不認他。

en: And everyone who speaks a word against the Son of Man will be forgiven, but the one who blasphemes against the Holy Spirit will not be forgiven.
zh: 凡說話得罪人子的，還可以赦免；但褻瀆聖靈的，必不得赦免。

en: And when they bring you before the synagogues and the rulers and the authorities, do not be anxious about how you should defend yourself or what you should say,
zh: 人把你們拉到會堂、官長和當權者的面前，你們不要思慮怎樣申辯或說甚麼話。

en: for the Holy Spirit will teach you in that very hour what you ought to say."
zh: 到了時候，聖靈必把當說的話教導你們。”

en: Someone in the crowd said to him, "Teacher, tell my brother to divide the inheritance with me."
zh: 群眾中有一個人對耶穌說：“老師，請吩咐我的兄弟和我分家業。”

en: But he said to him, "Man, who made me a judge or arbitrator over you?"
zh: 耶穌說：“你這個人，誰立我作你們的審判官和分家業的人呢？”

en: And he said to them, "Take care, and be on your guard against all covetousness, for one's life does not consist in the abundance of his possessions."
zh: 於是他對眾人說：“你們要謹慎，遠離一切貪心，因為人的生命並不在於家道豐富。”

en: And he told them a parable, saying, "The land of a rich man produced plentifully,
zh: 就對他們講了一個比喻，說：“有一個富翁的田地豐收。

en: and he thought to himself, 'What shall I do, for I have nowhere to store my crops?'
zh: 他自己心裡說：‘怎麼辦呢？因為我沒有足夠的地方收藏出產了！’

en: And he said, 'I will do this: I will tear down my barns and build larger ones, and there I will store all my grain and my goods.
zh: 又說：‘我要這樣辦：我要拆掉這些倉房，建造更大的，好在那裡收藏我的一切糧食和貨物。

en: And I will say to my soul, Soul, you have ample goods laid up for many years; relax, eat, drink, be merry.'
zh: 然後，我要對我的靈魂說：靈魂啊，你擁有許多好東西，足夠多年享用，只管安安逸逸地吃喝快樂吧！’

en: But God said to him, 'Fool! This night your soul is required of you, and the things you have prepared, whose will they be?'
zh: 神卻對他說：‘無知的人哪，今天晚上，你的靈魂必被取去，你所預備的要歸給誰呢？’

en: So is the one who lays up treasure for himself and is not rich toward God."
zh: 凡為自己積財，在 神面前卻不富足的，也是這樣。”

en: And he said to his disciples, "Therefore I tell you, do not be anxious about your life, what you will eat, nor about your body, what you will put on.
zh: 耶穌又對門徒說：“所以我告訴你們，不要為生命憂慮吃甚麼，也不要為身體憂慮穿甚麼。

en: For life is more than food, and the body more than clothing.
zh: 因為生命比飲食重要，身體比衣服重要。

en: Consider the ravens: they neither sow nor reap, they have neither storehouse nor barn, and yet God feeds them. Of how much more value are you than the birds!
zh: 你們想想烏鴉：牠們不種也不收，無倉又無庫， 神尚且養活牠們；你們比飛鳥貴重得多了。

en: And which of you by being anxious can add a single hour to his span of life?
zh: 你們中間誰能用憂慮使自己的壽命延長一刻呢？

en: If then you are not able to do as small a thing as that, why are you anxious about the rest?
zh: 既然連這極小的事都不能作，為甚麼還憂慮其他的事呢？

en: Consider the lilies, how they grow: they neither toil nor spin, yet I tell you, even Solomon in all his glory was not arrayed like one of these.
zh: 你們想想百合花，怎樣不勞苦，也不紡織。但我告訴你們，就是所羅門最榮華的時候所穿的，也比不上這花中的一朵呢。

en: But if God so clothes the grass, which is alive in the field today, and tomorrow is thrown into the oven, how much more will he clothe you, O you of little faith!
zh: 小信的人哪，田野的草，今天還在，明天就投進爐裡， 神尚且這樣給它裝飾，何況你們呢？

en: And do not seek what you are to eat and what you are to drink, nor be worried.
zh: 你們不要求吃甚麼，喝甚麼，也不要憂慮，

en: For all the nations of the world seek after these things, and your Father knows that you need them.
zh: 因為這一切都是世上不信的人所尋求的。你們的父原知道你們需要這一切。

en: Instead, seek his kingdom, and these things will be added to you.
zh: 你們只管求他的國，這些東西都必加給你們。

en: "Fear not, little flock, for it is your Father's good pleasure to give you the kingdom.
zh: 你們這小群，不要怕，因為你們的父樂意把國賜給你們。

en: Sell your possessions, and give to the needy. Provide yourselves with moneybags that do not grow old, with a treasure in the heavens that does not fail, where no thief approaches and no moth destroys.
zh: 當變賣你們所有的施捨給人，為自己製造不朽壞的錢囊，積蓄用不盡的財寶在天上，就是賊不能近、蟲不能蛀的地方。

en: For where your treasure is, there will your heart be also.
zh: 因為你們的財寶在哪裡，你們的心也在哪裡。

en: "Stay dressed for action and keep your lamps burning,
zh: “你們的腰當束起來，燈也該點著，

en: and be like men who are waiting for their master to come home from the wedding feast, so that they may open the door to him at once when he comes and knocks.
zh: 像等候自己的主人從婚筵回來一樣，好叫你們在主人回來敲門時，立刻給他開門。

en: Blessed are those servants whom the master finds awake when he comes. Truly, I say to you, he will dress himself for service and have them recline at table, and he will come and serve them.
zh: 主人來到了，看見僕人警醒，這些僕人就有福了。我實在告訴你們，主人必親自束腰，招待他們吃飯，進前來侍候他們。

en: If he comes in the second watch, or in the third, and finds them awake, blessed are those servants!
zh: 主人也許半夜之前，或天亮之前回來，看見他們這樣，這些僕人就有福了。

en: But know this, that if the master of the house had known at what hour the thief was coming, he would not have left his house to be broken into.
zh: 你們都知道，家主若曉得竊賊甚麼時候來，就不會讓他摸進屋裡。

en: You also must be ready, for the Son of Man is coming at an hour you do not expect."
zh: 你們也要準備妥當，因為在想不到的時候，人子就來了。”

en: Peter said, "Lord, are you telling this parable for us or for all?"
zh: 彼得說：“主啊，你說這比喻，是為我們還是為眾人呢？”

en: And the Lord said, "Who then is the faithful and wise manager, whom his master will set over his household, to give them their portion of food at the proper time?
zh: 主說：“誰是那忠心精明的管家，被主人指派管理家裡的僕人，按時分糧呢？

en: Blessed is that servant whom his master will find so doing when he comes.
zh: 主人來到的時候，看見他這樣作，那僕人就有福了。

en: Truly, I say to you, he will set him over all his possessions.
zh: 我實在告訴你們，主人要指派他管理主人的一切財產。

en: But if that servant says to himself, 'My master is delayed in coming,' and begins to beat the male and female servants, and to eat and drink and get drunk,
zh: 如果那僕人心裡說：‘我的主人不會那麼快回來’，就動手打其他的僕人使女，並且吃喝醉酒；

en: the master of that servant will come on a day when he does not expect him and at an hour he does not know, and will cut him in pieces and put him with the unfaithful.
zh: 在他想不到的日子、不知道的時間，那僕人的主人要來，嚴厲地處罰他，使他和不信的人同在一起。

en: And that servant who knew his master's will but did not get ready or act according to his will, will receive a severe beating.
zh: 那僕人知道主人的意思，卻不預備，也不照他的意思行，必多受責打；

en: But the one who did not know, and did what deserved a beating, will receive a light beating. Everyone to whom much was given, of him much will be required, and from him to whom they entrusted much, they will demand the more.
zh: 但那不知道的，雖然作了該受責打的事，也必少受責打。多給誰就向誰多取，多託誰就向誰多要。

en: "I came to cast fire on the earth, and would that it were already kindled!
zh: “我來要把火投在地上，如果燒了起來，那是我所願意的。

en: I have a baptism to be baptized with, and how great is my distress until it is accomplished!
zh: 我有應當受的洗，我是多麼迫切地期待這事完成。

en: Do you think that I have come to give peace on earth? No, I tell you, but rather division.
zh: 你們以為我來是要地上有和平嗎？不是的，我告訴你們，是要有紛爭。

en: For from now on in one house there will be five divided, three against two and two against three.
zh: 從今以後，一家五口將起紛爭，三個反對兩個，兩個反對三個。

en: They will be divided, father against son and son against father, mother against daughter and daughter against mother, mother-in-law against her daughter-in-law and daughter-in-law against mother-in-law."
zh: 他們將起紛爭： 父親反對兒子， 兒子反對父親， 母親反對女兒， 女兒反對母親， 婆婆反對媳婦， 媳婦反對婆婆。”

en: He also said to the crowds, "When you see a cloud rising in the west, you say at once, 'A shower is coming.' And so it happens.
zh: 耶穌又對眾人說：“你們一看見西邊有雲彩升起來，就說：‘要下大雨’，果然這樣；

en: And when you see the south wind blowing, you say, 'There will be scorching heat,' and it happens.
zh: 起了南風，就說：‘天要熱了’，也果然這樣。

en: You hypocrites! You know how to interpret the appearance of earth and sky, but why do you not know how to interpret the present time?
zh: 偽君子啊！你們知道分辨天地的氣象，怎麼不知道分辨這個時代呢？

en: "And why do you not judge for yourselves what is right?
zh: “你們為甚麼自己不能判斷甚麼是對的呢？

en: As you go with your accuser before the magistrate, make an effort to settle with him on the way, lest he drag you to the judge, and the judge hand you over to the officer, and the officer put you in prison.
zh: 你和你的對頭去見官長，還在路上的時候，應當盡力向他求和，免得他把你拉到法官面前，法官把你交給差役，差役把你關在監裡。

en: I tell you, you will never get out until you have paid the very last penny."
zh: 我告訴你，除非你還清最後的一個小錢，否則決不能從那裡出來。”
